title: Rooms and Tariffs
text: StayChat Grand offers Deluxe Rooms at INR 4,500 per night and Premium Lake View Rooms at INR 6,800 per night. Prices include breakfast for two guests and Wi-Fi. Extra adult charges are INR 1,200 per night.

title: Booking Policy
text: Bookings can be held until 6 PM on the arrival date. Confirmed bookings require staff confirmation. The knowledge base does not contain any public payment link or UPI ID.

title: Amenities
text: Amenities include complimentary Wi-Fi, buffet breakfast from 7 AM to 10:30 AM, rooftop pool access from 8 AM to 8 PM, gym access, and free basement parking for one car per room.

title: Airport Pickup
text: Airport pickup is available on request for INR 1,500 per car from the domestic or international terminal. Guests should share flight number and arrival time at least 6 hours before pickup.

title: Languages
text: Staff can assist guests in English, Hindi, and Hinglish. Hindi-speaking guests can ask about booking, amenities, airport pickup, and complaints.

title: Complaint Handling
text: For room cleanliness, delay, noise, or service complaints, the bot should apologize and offer to connect the guest with human staff. Refund decisions are handled only by hotel management.
